actions.intent: Start near the lower route and break the first route tax.
Open the lower rescue edge before water rises.
Use a stabilizing clear while staying on rescue tempo.
Extract the lower puppy before the flooded row catches the route.
Begin the upper pivot after the urgent rescue.
Break the key ice on the upper route.
Finish the opened route and extract the second puppy.

notes: Designer golden for ice under water pressure: lower urgent rescue first, then ice-enabled upper pivot.
